name: takaful-monorepo
description: Takaful Financial Year Report - Monorepo Setup

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install-server && npm run install-client
